files.patch: @@ -5891,3 +5891,5 @@ - When preview features are enabled, the frame's method is a value class - constructor and the requested local is a "this" value object, - the value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object. + When preview features are enabled, if the requested local is the + "this" object, and "this" is a value + object under construction, the value_ptr is set to a snapshot + of the"this" object that represents the value + object's state at the point the snapshot is taken. @@ -5947,3 +5949,4 @@ - When preview features are enabled, the frame's method is a value class - constructor and the local instance is a value object, - the value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object. + When preview features are enabled, and the local instance is a value + object under construction, the value_ptr is set to a snapshot + of the"this" object that represents the value + object's state at the point the snapshot is taken.
